title: acer tataricum subvar. crispatum
intro: Acer tataricum subvar. crispatum, also known as the Tatarian maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree with compound leaves that are typically 5-9 leaflets. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer tataricum subvar. crispatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. This plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
